extortion.description: The Solano County Library is a public library system serving the cities of Dixon, Fairfield, Rio Vista, Suisun City, Vacaville and Vallejo, California. The Solano County Library was established in 1914 by the county's board of supervisors. Solano County Library corporate office is located in 601 Pintail Dr 763, Suisun City, California, 94585, United States and has 67 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 85.02 GB
